title: Weedol Path Weed Killer Liquid Concentrate 12 Tubes Treats 120m2 Garden Path & Patio Weed Control
features: Use on gravel, paths, drives, patios, along fences and walls and around established trees/shrubs

Visible results in 3 hours Our fast acting formula means visible results in just 3 hours, working right in front of your eyes! No measuring, no mess tubes Just squeeze the liquid from a pre-measured concentrate tube into a garden sprayer and go. Next page 1 For Paths, Patios, Drives 2 Results in 3 hours 3 No Measuring, No Mess Kills weeds in gravel, patios and driveways with results in 3 hours A pre-mixed ready to use weedkiller that is ideal for use on gravel paths, permeable patios and driveways. Once sprayed, the active ingredient pelargonic acid starts working immediatley giving you results in 3 hours and breaks down in soil naturally - leaving the area ready for replanting in just 3 days. The ready to use format makes it convenient for spot treatment. The bottle is made from 100% recycled plastic and is all recyclable along with the trigger. Why should I use Weedol Path & Gravel Control? Weedol Path & Gravel Control is glyphosate-free, kills weeds and active ingredient breaks down in soil naturally. Ideal for permeable patios and driveways. Visible results may be seen in 2-3 hours. Where can I use Weedol Path & Gravel Control? Suitable for use on gravel areas, pathways, permeable patios and driveways. For the control of weeds around ornamental garden plants, trees, and areas not intended to bear vegetation. When should I use Weedol Path & Gravel Control? April – November when weeds are actively growing. For best results apply in calm, dry, warm conditions, usually early spring or summer, when there is no risk of spray drift onto adjacent desirable plants. Most effective on young weeds less than 10cm. How do I use Weedol Path & Gravel Control? Hold the sprayer approximately 50cm away from target weed and spray weeds evenly to lightly wet leaves, avoiding run-off. Apply at a rate of 30mL/m². Is Weedol Path & Gravel Control safe to use on areas used by children and pets? Keep children and pets away from treated areas until spray has dried. Keep out of the reach of children.
